name: Alex Chen
description: Primary demo persona. Configures plans, processes life events, monitors carrier/payroll integration, and uses the AI Requirements Studio.

name: Maria Torres
description: Manages employee data, approves life events, and handles enrollment exceptions.

name: James Wilson
description: Reviews benefits program at the group level. Can see enrollment summaries and plan performance dashboards.

name: Rachel Kim
description: Employee self-service portal. Enrolls in benefits, views elections, submits life events.

name: David Park
description: Analyzes enrollment trends, plan utilization, and premium cost modeling. Heavy user of AI requirements output.

name: Susan Carter
description: Carrier-side representative. Reviews eligibility submissions, responds to transactions, manages carrier configuration.

name: Mark Johnson
description: Manages payroll deduction files, reconciles benefit deductions, resolves mismatches.

name: Lisa Anderson
description: Uses AI Requirements Studio to extract, refine, and export requirements. Primary Epic 5 persona.
